sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114431" key="xorhgi/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χορηγ-ίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n114431.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">woman-choragus,</tr_> title of a Comedy by Alexis.</sense> </entryFree>
